---
title: "Research & Extension"
toc: true
toc-title: "Jump to"
---

<span class="section-label">Scholarship & Outreach</span>
<div class="rule-accent"></div>

My work in research and extension aims to identify relevant questions, determine answers, and explore the implications for stakeholders.

---

## Peer-Reviewed Publications

<ul class="pub-list">

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2025</div>
<div>
<strong>"Feed Prices, Substitution Patterns, and Technical Efficiency in Feedlot Cattle"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-journal">Journal Article</span><br>
Anderson, A.E., Mitchell, J.L., and Luke, J.R.<br>
<em>Journal of Agricultural and Applied Economics</em>, Vol. 58(1), pp. 17–37.<br>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/aae.2025.10018">DOI</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2025</div>
<div>
<strong>"Assessing the Implicit Prices of Health and Wellness Product Attributes in Pet Food: A Hedonic Analysis Approach"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-journal">Journal Article</span><br>
Hobbs, L. and Anderson, A.<br>
<em>Journal of Agricultural and Applied Economics</em>, Vol. 57(2), pp. 321–339.<br>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/aae.2025.11">DOI</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2020</div>
<div>
<strong>"An Analysis of Yield Variation Under Soil Conservation Practices"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-journal">Journal Article</span><br>
Anderson, A.E., Hammac, W.A., Stott, D.E., and Tyner, W.E.<br>
<em>Journal of Soil and Water Conservation</em>, Vol. 75(1), pp. 103–111.<br>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.2489/jswc.75.1.103">DOI</a>
</div>
</li>

</ul>

---

## Extension Publications

### Fact Sheets & Reports

<ul class="pub-list">

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2025</div>
<div>
<strong>"Economic Impacts of Utility-Scale Wind Turbines: What Rural Arkansas Counties Need to Know"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-report">Fact Sheet</span><br>
Anderson, A.E., Hughes, M.N., and Goodman, H.P.<br>
University of Arkansas Division of Agriculture, FSA102.<br>
<a href="https://www.uaex.uada.edu/publications/pdf/FSA102.pdf">PDF</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2025</div>
<div>
<strong>"Economic Impacts of Utility-Scale Wind Turbine Generators on Rural Counties in the U.S.: Implications for Arkansas"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-report">Extension Report</span><br>
Anderson, A.E., Hughes, M.N., and Goodman, H.P.<br>
University of Arkansas Division of Agriculture, Publication FC-2025-005, September 2025.<br>
<a href="https://bpb-us-e1.wpmucdn.com/wordpressua.uark.edu/dist/6/907/files/2025/12/Economic-Impacts-of-Utility-scale-Wind-Turbine-Generators-.pdf">PDF</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2022</div>
<div>
<strong>"An Updated Evaluation of the U.S. Cattle Cycle"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-report">Extension Publication</span><br>
Luke, J.R., Anderson, A.E., and Tonsor, G.T.<br>
Kansas State University Department of Agricultural Economics, March 2022.<br>
<a href="https://agmanager.info/livestock-meat/production-economics/updated-evaluation-us-cattle-cycle">agmanager.info</a>
</div>
</li>

</ul>

---
